title: Drug sensitivity assay (CCK8)
steps: Cells (1×10 5 cells/ml) were inoculated into 96-well plates.

Cells were treated with vincristine (VCR), doxorubicin (ADM), etoposide phosphate (Vp-16), daunorubicin (DNR), mitomycin C (MMC), or cyclophosphamide (CTX) for 24 h before CCK8 (Dojindo) reagent was added to each well for 4 h at 37°C.
Absorbance was then read in a plate reader at 450 nm. Sensitivity to the chemotherapeutic agents was calculated after 24 h by measuring proliferation as described above.
creator: Shuangshuang Li
